text:
<think>The total amount repaid on the loan is $10,092. I now need to calculate a 20% tip on this amount using the calculate_tip_amount tool.</think>
<tool_call_answer>[{"name": "calculate_tip_amount", "arguments": {"bill_amount": "$var1.output_0$", "tip_percent": 20}, "label": "$var2"}]</tool_call_answer>
